summary: ThreeDScene Menger sponge with fractal dim log 20/log 3 ≈ 2.727. ValueTracker level_tr steps 0→2 (level 3 prohibitive). always_redraw rebuilds surviving 20^L subcubes (keep if ≥2 nonzero among dx, dy, dz; 6 face + 1 center removed per 27). BLUE→ORANGE color gradient based on position. Live level, count, (20/27)^L volume.
